title: rosa × dumetorum f. subcollina
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. subcollina is a variant of the Rosa × dumetorum, a hybrid rose species, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Rosa × dumetorum f. subcollina is also valued for its antioxidant and antiviral properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
